ast.name: DeadMansSwitch

functions.name: __covenant_policy_heartbeat

exprs.span: { owner: prev_states[0].owner, heir: prev_states[0].heir, last_active: now_bucket, timeout: prev_states[0].timeout }

data.span: return({ owner: prev_states[0].owner, heir: prev_states[0].heir, last_active: now_bucket, timeout: prev_states[0].timeout });

functions.body_span:
require(checkSig(auth, prev_states[0].owner));
        return({ owner: prev_states[0].owner, heir: prev_states[0].heir, last_active: now_bucket, timeout: prev_states[0].timeout });

functions.name: __leader_heartbeat
functions.body_span:
require(checkSig(auth, prev_states[0].owner));
        return({ owner: prev_states[0].owner, heir: prev_states[0].heir, last_active: now_bucket, timeout: prev_states[0].timeout });

functions.name: __delegate_heartbeat
functions.body_span:
require(checkSig(auth, prev_states[0].owner));
        return({ owner: prev_states[0].owner, heir: prev_states[0].heir, last_active: now_bucket, timeout: prev_states[0].timeout });

functions.name: __covenant_policy_claim

exprs.span: { owner: prev_states[0].heir, heir: prev_states[0].heir, last_active: now_bucket, timeout: prev_states[0].timeout }

data.span: return({ owner: prev_states[0].heir, heir: prev_states[0].heir, last_active: now_bucket, timeout: prev_states[0].timeout });

functions.name: __leader_claim
__delegate_claim
